title: ATAC-seq on nuclei from frozen Drosophila melanogaster embryo halves
author: Jenna Haines
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kj5cuq6

steps.title: Lysis Buffer NO detergent 10mM Tris-Hcl, pH 7
steps.instruction: Lysis Buffer NO detergent 10mM Tris-Hcl, pH 7.4 10mM NaC1 3mM MgCl2 Store at 4dC- make fresh weekly Lysis Buffer Freezing Media 10ml Lysis Buffer No Detergent 1ml of 50% glycerol 1ul of bromoblue dye Lysis Buffer + Spermine 10ml Lysis Buffer No Detergent 0.15mM spermine

steps.title: Put several hundred adult OregonR Drosophila melanogaster (http://flybase
steps.instruction: Put several hundred adult OregonR Drosophila melanogaster (http://flybase.org/reports/FBsn0000276.html) into a fly cage at 25°C for three days. Feed flies with standard molasses plates a spread of yeast paste. Collect embryos for 2 hours and then let them age at 25°C for an hour and thirty minutes. This should yield embryos between 2:00 and 3:30 hours old. 02:00:00, Embryo collection 01:30:00, Aging

steps.title: Bleach embryos for 3 minutes in...
steps.instruction: Bleach embryos for 3 minutes in 30%-50% bleach to remove the chorion. 00:03:00, Bleaching

steps.title: Stage the embryos to the desired age
steps.instruction: Stage the embryos to the desired age. We usually go for Stage 5. a

steps.title: Place staged embryos into ependorf tubes...
steps.instruction: Place staged embryos into ependorf tubes containing Lysis buffer freezing media.

steps.title: Once embryos are frozen, immediately transfer...
steps.instruction: Once embryos are frozen, immediately transfer the slide to a cold block that has been chilled. I surround the block with dry ice to keep it cool. Additionally, it is necessary to cool down the scalpel on dry ice before cutting. I leave the scalpel and 2 poker tools in dry ice while cutting to keep them cold. Be sure to wear gloves and keep the scalpel handle away from the dry ice to keep hands warm.

steps.title: Keep the slides, poker tool, and...
steps.instruction: Keep the slides, poker tool, and scalpel on dry ice to keep from melting. Shandon™ Straight Point Teasing Needles, Straight Point, Wooden Handle, 5.5 in. (14.0cm) Thermo Scientific Catalog #19010 Fisherbrand™ High Precision #10 Style Scalpel Blade Fisher Scientific Catalog #12-000-162

steps.title: Underneath a dissection scope, space out...
steps.instruction: Underneath a dissection scope, space out staged embryos on the glass slide such that they are evenly separated and can be cut easily with the blade. I affix a grid pattern to the bottom side of the glass slide to offer contrast to the white embryos.

steps.title: Once the embryos are lined up...
steps.instruction: Once the embryos are lined up on a slide, gently place the slide on dry ice for 2-5 minutes while you prepare the next slide. The embryos will turn from clear to completely white when frozen. I usually line up 10 embryos / slide and slice 5-6 slides at a time. 00:05:00, Placement on dry ice

steps.title: Crush using a plastic pestle upwards of 20 times vigorously
steps.instruction: Crush using a plastic pestle upwards of 20 times vigorously. Pellet pestles Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Z359947

steps.title: After homogenization, rinse the pestle with...
steps.instruction: After homogenization, rinse the pestle with 50ul of lysis buffer to make sure not to lose any material. This will bring the total volume up to 100ul. undetermined, Lysis buffer

steps.title: Vortex slightly at low speed and...
steps.instruction: Vortex slightly at low speed and spin down on a table top centrifuge.

steps.title: Add 1ul of 10% IGEPAL CA-630...
steps.instruction: Add 1ul of 10% IGEPAL CA-630 drop-wise to a final concentration of 0.1%. Mix well by flicking tube with a finger. Let sit for about 10 minutes undetermined, 10% IGEPAL CA-630 00:10:00, Wait

steps.title: Spin in microcentrifuge at 800xg for 10 minutes at 4dC
steps.instruction: Spin in microcentrifuge at 800xg for 10 minutes at 4dC. Remove as much supernatant as possible to to avoid nuclei loss. 00:10:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei in enough DNAse and...
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei in enough DNAse and RNAse free water for the transposition reaction (below).

steps.title: Once your tube contains the desired...
steps.instruction: Once your tube contains the desired number of embryo halves, move on to isolate the nuclei.

steps.title: Cut embryos along the midline with...
steps.instruction: Cut embryos along the midline with the dry ice chilled blade or scalpel. Move each half to a 1.5ml tube filled with 50ul of ATAC Lysis buffer + Spermine with the chilled poker tool. The embryos will thaw and dissolve as soon as they are transfered. To reduce contamination, we use 2 poker tools, one to handle anterior halves and one to handle posterior halves. Additionally, we wash pokers in 70% EtOH between slices undetermined, ATAC Lysis buffer + Spermine

steps.title: To amplify transposed DNA fragments, combine...
steps.instruction: To amplify transposed DNA fragments, combine the following in a PCR tube: 10 μL Transposed DNA 5 ul 25uM Primer 1 5 ul 25uM Primer 2 25ul NebNext 2x Master Mix 5ul of PPC 50 μL Total Run PCR as follows: (1) 72°C, 5 min (2) 98°C, 30 sec (3) 98°C, 10 sec (4) 63°C, 30 sec (5) 72°C, 1 min (6) Repeat steps 3-5, 5x (7) Hold at 4°C

steps.title: Make sure the cell pellet is set on ice
steps.instruction: Make sure the cell pellet is set on ice. To make the transposition reaction mix, combine the following: %s %s Nextera DNA library preparation kit 24 samples Contributed by users Catalog #FC-121-1030

steps.title: Gently pipette to resuspend nuclei in the transposition reaction mix
steps.instruction: Gently pipette to resuspend nuclei in the transposition reaction mix.

steps.title: Incubate the transposition reaction at 37°C for 30 min
steps.instruction: Incubate the transposition reaction at 37°C for 30 min . Immediately following transposition, purify using a Qiagen MinElute Kit . 00:30:00, Tagmentation MinElute Reaction Cleanup Kit Qiagen Catalog #28204

steps.title: Chill a cold block in the...
steps.instruction: Chill a cold block in the -80 for at least 30 minutes. Once it's cold, place in a box surrounded by dry ice to keep it cool while you slice Corning® CoolRack CF15, Holds 15 Cryovial or FACS Tubes (Product #432049) Corning Catalog #432049 00:30:00, Freezing

steps.title: Purified DNA can be stored at...
steps.instruction: Purified DNA can be stored at -20°C I quantify DNA at this point with the qubit.

steps.title: You can stop at this point...
steps.instruction: You can stop at this point and run a small qPCR reaction to calculate the number of additional cycles to use to avoid overamplification. Take out 5 ul of PCR reaction and run the qPCR reaction with the same conditions. 5 μL Transposed DNA 0.25 ul 25uM Primer 1 0.25 ul 25uM Primer 2 5ul NebNext 2x Master Mix 3.9 ul of H20 0.09 100x Sybr Green I Dye _______________________ 15 μL Total Put in the QPCR machine and run: 1 cycle: 30 sec 98° C 20 cycles: 10 sec 98° C 30 sec 63° C 1 min 72° C. To calculate the additional number of cycles needed, plot linear Rn (fluorescence) versus cycle and determine the cycle number that corresponds to one-third of the maximum fluorescent intensity.

steps.title: Once you decide how many additional...
steps.instruction: Once you decide how many additional cycles to run, run the rest of the PCR : (2) 98°C, 30 sec (3) 98°C, 10 sec (4) 63°C , 30 sec (5) 72°C, 1 min For X cycles (7) Hold at 4dC

steps.title: Bring Beads to RT
steps.instruction: Bring Beads to RT.

steps.title: To validate your libraries, quantify them...
steps.instruction: To validate your libraries, quantify them with qubit HS DNA and evaluate them with the Bioanalyzer High Sensitivity DNA assay. Sometimes they look like this: a Sometimes they look like this: I usually see this when I am working with smaller amounts of embryos. Below is from one embryo half. I am not 100% sure what this means (whether it's actually undertagmented or what) but when I sequenced this sample the data was comprable to my other samples. If you have any ideas let me know! I usually try not to sequence these samples but they could be perfectly fine. a

steps.title: Rinse well with water
steps.instruction: Rinse well with water. Pat dry on towel.

steps.title: Rinse with 1xPBS + 0
steps.instruction: Rinse with 1xPBS + 0.5% Triton.

steps.title: Brush embryos into an 1
steps.instruction: Brush embryos into an 1.5ml tube filled with 1xPBS + 0.5% Triton. Let embryos settle. Then use a pipette tip to transfer a drop of embryos to a slide.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.25x Beads, Mix well, let stand for 5 minutes. 00:05:00, Wait

steps.title: Put on a magnet, let stand for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Put on a magnet, let stand for 2 minutes. 00:02:00, Magnet

steps.title: Wash with 70% EtOH
steps.instruction: Wash with 70% EtOH. (1/2)

steps.title: Wash with 70% EtOH
steps.instruction: Wash with 70% EtOH. (2/2)

steps.title: Let dry for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Let dry for 10 minutes. 00:10:00, Drying

steps.title: Resuspend in 20ul H 2 O
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 20ul H 2 O. undetermined, H2O

steps.title: Let sit for one minute, put...
steps.instruction: Let sit for one minute, put on magnet, take of super. 00:01:00, Wait
